releaseNotes:
• New local seasonal greetings are landing in your app! These thematical photo add-ons are tailored to your local celebrations and only available for a limited time. Keep an eye on Frameo all year round to stay ready for everything from the World Cup to Christmas!

• We’re always updating things to keep everything running beautifully. A rare bug gave some 4K video playbacks a little stage fright recently, but we’ve done a quick tune-up - your HD videos are playing smoothly again!
description:
Share moments instantly. Connect families forever. Send photos and videos from your phone to your loved ones’ frames in seconds. Join over 25 million users who trust Frameo to bridge the distance.

The Heart of Your Home: Photo Frame & Smart Calendar
Frameo is your unified family hub that collects your memories and plans in one place. Whether it’s scheduling a summer vacation or capturing a toddler’s first steps, your best moments land directly into the homes of those you love.

Features:

• Send up to 10 photos or 15-second videos at a time – repeat as often as you like! Your memories appear on the frame in seconds, creating a beautiful, evolving gallery.

• Keep everyone in sync with the smart family calendar. Sync your schedule, birthdays, and events from your phone directly to the frame so no one misses a moment.

• Add captions to give context to your photos or use Greetings – fun graphical themes to place on top of your photos to make seasons and celebrations feel extra special.

• Easily group memories from weddings, holidays, or vacations into dedicated Albums. Use your frame to organize and enjoy your favorite chapters of life whenever you choose.

• Connect to any frame with a unique code and invite as many people as you like to share their photos. You’ll even get a notification the moment a loved one "likes" your photo!

• Security You Can Trust: Your privacy is our priority. With end-to-end encryption and strict adherence to global standards (GDPR, CCPA, and PSTI), your photos and data remain entirely private.

Always Evolving & Up to Date: When you choose Frameo, your experience only gets better. We provide regular, free updates for your app and frame – ensuring your product is up to date and gaining new features regularly.

Enhance your photo-sharing experience with Frameo+

• Send 100 photos: Share up to 100 photos at a time – perfect for those big holiday albums.

• Send longer videos: Send video clips up to 2 minutes long.

• Manage frame photos remotely: Hide or delete photos on your frame directly from your phone app.

• Cloud Backup: Safely back up your frame’s library with client-side encryption.

• Google Cast compatible: Bring your photos to the big screen by casting from the app to your TV.

• Choose between two plans: $1.99 monthly / $16.99 yearly*
*Price may vary depending on country.

Don't have a frame? Whether you’re setting up your own new frame or connecting to a loved one’s, the Frameo app is all you need. Use it to easily manage your digital gallery or simply to send photos to family and friends – no matter the distance between you. No purchase required to start sharing – just download and connect.

Please note: The Frameo app only works with official Frameo WiFi photo frames. Buy a Frameo-powered frame here: http://frameo.com
